findings.issue: Index builder is in archive/ and not executed; INDEXED_PATHS includes 'packages/swarm' but builder is inactive. Result: code-index.json has 0 modules/endpoints despite recent built_at.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/, add GitHub Action to run it on every push, and verify INDEXED_PATHS includes correct targets.

whistleblower_flag: Index corruption risks systemic drift — swarm agents operate on false context.
